text: 1 N,O Desflurane Sevoflurane 0.8 Isoflurane u- L o0s Halothane | 0.4 0 10 20 30 Minutes of Administration Fig. 13.1 Comparison of inhaled anesthetic solubility. Solubility determines the rate of increase in the alveolar (F,) anesthetic concen- tration toward the inspired concentration (F,). The least soluble anesthetic vapor (desflurane) shows the most rapid increase; while the most soluble anesthetic (halothane) shows the slowest increase. Adapted from Eger |I, Edmond |. New Inhaled Anesthetics Anesthesi- ology 1994; 80:906-922.
